custom_fields.description: Must be entered accurately into the LC application.
custom_fields.label: Account Number / IBAN
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-account_number_iban

custom_fields.description: Beneficiary bank name — used by issuing bank to route payment.
custom_fields.label: Bank
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-bank

custom_fields.description: Exact legal name — becomes the LC applicant.
custom_fields.label: Buyer Name
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-buyer_name

custom_fields.description: Freight charges as agreed (separate from item prices).
custom_fields.label: Freight Charges
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-freight_charges

custom_fields.description: Determines who arranges freight and insurance.
custom_fields.label: Incoterms
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-incoterm

custom_fields.description: Container type, size, and other details.
custom_fields.label: Mode of Shipment (Container Details)
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-mode_of_shipment

custom_fields.label: Payment Terms
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-payment_terms
custom_fields.options:
LC at Sight
Usance
Deferred Payment

custom_fields.description: Destination port — must match across all documents.
custom_fields.label: Port of Discharge
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-port_of_discharge

custom_fields.description: Origin port — must match across LC, B/L and commercial invoice.
custom_fields.label: Port of Loading
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-port_of_loading

custom_fields.description: South Asian Free Trade Area preference — may reduce customs duty.
custom_fields.label: SAFTA Clause
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-safta_clause

custom_fields.description: SWIFT BIC — issuing bank uses this to route MT700 and eventual payment.
custom_fields.label: SWIFT Code
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-swift_code

custom_fields.description: +/- allowance on the total PI value, if agreed with supplier.
custom_fields.label: Tolerance (%) on Total PI Value
custom_fields.name: Purchase Invoice-tolerance_percent
